{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Grand Elder
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Unsouled (novel)|Unsouled]]
}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Grand Elder]] of the [[Heaven's Glory]] School is a powerful [[Jade]] and serves a role similar to a Patriarch or Matriarch of a clan.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16">''Unsouled'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Grand Elder]] of the [[Heaven's Glory]] School is a mountain of a man with huge muscles.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
